content: We can refactor DeepResearch Agents to use HippoRAG2’s biologically inspired hierarchical memory architecture as a persistent, context-aware long-term memory backbone, which lets agents dynamically retrieve prior research traces instead of re-computing exploration paths from scratch for every new query. This creates a self-improving research loop where the agent’s accumulated discoveries are incrementally indexed and surface relevant past insights that steer new exploration toward unstudied, high-value gaps.
